faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Lead Express

items.q: How does Lead Express find leads?
items.a: Our AI monitors WhatsApp groups 24/7 — both groups you share with us and our own curated database. It identifies real job requests and sends you only the ones matching your trade and area.

items.q: Can I add my own WhatsApp groups?
items.a: Yes! Share invite links to groups you're already in. Our AI will monitor them alongside our own groups in your area.

items.q: What can Rebeca do for me?
items.a: Rebeca is your AI assistant on WhatsApp. Send her a voice message to check your stats, pause leads, update your trades, or distribute a job to your contractor network — all without leaving WhatsApp.

items.q: Can I earn from jobs I can't take?
items.a: Yes! Forward any lead to your subcontractor network. Set your commission terms, and Rebeca handles the distribution and tracking.

items.q: How fast do I get notified?
items.a: In real time. The moment a matching job is posted, you get a WhatsApp message with all the details. Be the first to respond.
About 2 minutes. Pick your trade, set your area, and optionally share your group links. Leads start coming in immediately.

cta.title: Stop missing jobs. Start today.
cta.desc: Your WhatsApp groups are full of work opportunities right now. Every minute you're not monitoring them, someone else is closing the deal. Let our AI do the work for you.
